title: LLM Core & Session Management

classes.name: BaseSession
methods: ask(self, prompt: str, stream: bool=False) -> str|Generator
classes.notes: ask() manages history, calls trim_messages_history(), then raw_ask(); yields tool_use blocks if present

classes.name: ClaudeSession
classes.notes: Calls Anthropic /messages API with SSE. Applies cache_control to last 2 user messages. Uses _parse_claude_sse().

classes.name: LLMSession
classes.notes: OpenAI-compatible backend. Delegates to _openai_stream(). make_messages() uses _msgs_claude2oai() converter.

classes.name: NativeClaudeSession
classes.notes: Poses as Claude CLI (claude-code beta headers). Supports both streaming and non-streaming. ask() returns MockResponse with tool_calls extracted. Calls openai_tools_to_claude() for tool conversion.

classes.name: NativeOAISession
classes.notes: OpenAI-format native session. raw_ask() prepends system message and uses _openai_stream() with tools param.

classes.name: MockToolCall
methods: __init__(self, name: str, args: dict|str, id: str='')
classes.notes: Wraps a tool invocation. args serialized to JSON string in MockFunction.arguments.

classes.name: MockResponse
classes.notes: stop_reason auto-set to 'tool_use' if tool_calls present.

classes.name: ToolClient
methods: chat(self, messages: list, tools: list=None) -> MockResponse
classes.notes: Text-protocol tool client for non-native backends. Injects tool schema as XML/text in prompt. Token-saving optimization: omits repeated tool schema if last_tools unchanged and total_cd_tokens <= 9000.

classes.name: MixinSession
classes.notes: Multi-session failover with spring-back to primary. Patches _sessions[0].raw_ask with _raw_ask. Broadcasts system/tools/temperature/max_tokens/reasoning_effort to all sessions. NativeClaudeSession sessions get tools converted via openai_tools_to_claude(). Spring-back after _spring_sec seconds.

classes.name: NativeToolClient
methods: chat(self, messages: list, tools: list=None) -> MockResponse
classes.notes: Wraps NativeClaudeSession/NativeOAISession. Injects thinking protocol into system prompt. Tracks pending tool IDs across turns; fills empty tool_result blocks for unresolved IDs.

key_relationships: MixinSession delegates to _orig_raw_asks (patching primary session raw_ask)
key_functions: trim_messages_history(history, context_win) — truncates history to fit context window
compress_history_tags(messages, keep_recent, max_len) — compresses <thinking>/<tool_use> tags every 5 calls
_openai_stream(api_base, api_key, messages, model, api_mode, ...) — raw OpenAI SSE call
_msgs_claude2oai(messages) — converts Claude message format to OpenAI format
openai_tools_to_claude(tools) — converts OpenAI tool schema to Anthropic format
_fix_messages(messages) — enforces alternating roles and tool_use/tool_result pairing
tryparse(json_str) — lenient JSON parser with multiple fallback strategies
important_notes: TokenTracker and LLMResponse are not present as classes — the scope description names are conceptual: token tracking is inline (total_cd_tokens in ToolClient, cache token logging in NativeClaudeSession), LLMResponse maps to MockResponse
ToolClient uses text-based tool protocol (XML tags + JSON) for non-native backends
NativeToolClient uses native API tool_use blocks for Claude/OAI native sessions
MixinSession implements round-robin fallback with spring-back: primary session is preferred, switched on error, reverts after spring_sec
All session classes use generator protocol: raw_ask() yields text chunks, returns content_blocks via StopIteration.value
Lazy key loading via module-level __getattr__ (mykeys, proxies)
